activities.title: Complete FEC Blocks 4-6
activities.description: Use the canvas wizard to complete Capture Value, Enable Value, and Unified Venture Proposition.
instructions: Open the Canvas Wizard from your Playbook
Review your Week 2 blocks (read-only at top)
Follow guided prompts for each new block
Mark complete when all blocks are filled
rubric: Capture Value: Revenue model and cost structure are clear and realistic
Enable Value: Key resources and partners are identified
UVP: Unique position is articulated and differentiated

activities.title: Squad Canvas Peer Review
activities.description: Each squad member presents one FEC block for feedback.
instructions: Take turns sharing your screen or canvas printout
Present one block (Capture Value, Enable Value, or UVP)
Squad provides constructive feedback (2 min per person)
Note gaps or areas to strengthen before Week 4
activities.facilitatorRole: Rotate between squads, ensure feedback is constructive and specific

activities.title: Advisory Practice Revenue Models
activities.description: Group discussion on different revenue models for advisory practices.
discussionQuestions: What are common revenue streams for financial advisors?
How do fee structures differ (commission, fee-only, hybrid)?
What cost structures do advisory practices typically have?
How does your revenue model align with your customer segment?
activities.facilitatorRole: Present examples, answer questions, connect to rookies' canvases
